hotel_info.about: Situated right in the heart of Manila, Manila Condominium Apartment Staycation long stay accepted Malate bay area nightlife and city center features a private pool and free WiFi. hotel_info.name: Sorrel Residences- 2 Bedroom Apartment
hotel_info.about: Boasting accommodation with a terrace, Sorrel Residences- 2 Bedroom Apartment is set in Manila. Free WiFi is offered throughout the property and private parking is available on site. The property is non-smoking and is situated 2.8 km from Malacanang Palace.The air-conditioned apartment is composed of 2 separate bedrooms, a living room, a fully equipped kitchen, and 1 bathroom. A flat-screen TV is provided.Guests can relax in the garden at the property.Smart Araneta Coliseum is 5.4 km from the apartment, while Shangri-La Plaza is 5.8 km from the property. Ninoy Aquino International Airport is 12 km away.
